title: rubus lambertianus subsp. xanthoneurus
intro: Rubus lambertianus subsp. xanthoneurus, also known as the 'yellow-fruited bramble', is a subspecies of the Rubus lambertianus species, which is a type of wild bramble. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus lambertianus subsp. xanthoneurus include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
